title: Player Containers
description: A (work-in-progress) mod that lets you store other players in items!
body:
Current features:
- The titular (basic) player container! Contained players can either spectate whoever's holding the container or move their camera in a limited range around the container.
- Three extra variants (two survival-obtainable, one creative-only) of the basic container that can hold three, five and infinite players respectively
- A variant of the basic container that captures *yourself* when used
- Another variant of the basic container that looks like your player model!
- A cage block that works as a container in item form and puts the contained player inside the block when placed
- Player essences, dropped on death
  - These will require a special weapon or item in order to obtain them future, however currently they *always* drop on player death.
- Dispensers can capture and release players from containers

Please note, as the latest version is for showcasing at BlanketCon '25, certain more buggy aspects of the mod have been disabled (notably, players being captured while offline and being able to move containers between dimensions)

**Also note that in order to use the mod you need to either disable the `playercontainer:restrictToBooth` gamerule or make an AreaLib area named `playercontainer:booth`!**

AreaLib is currently required, but I plan to make it an optional dependency in future.
